items.headline: Amplitude (AMPL) reported Q1 2026 results with ARR of $374M (+17% YoY) and revenue of $93.5M (+17% YoY); the company also hosted a webcast to discuss results and provide Q2 and full-year 2026 outlook
Amplitude (AMPL) will participate in upcoming investor conferences including Needham Technology, Media, and Telecom Conference and D.A. Davidson Technology & Consumer Conference
